title: Asyl Craft
description: A simple client side only modpack with great performance and utilitys.
body:
## ✨ Overview

This is a Fabric 1.21.10 client-side modpack built for players who want a smoother, cleaner, and more immersive Minecraft experience—without changing vanilla gameplay. Every mod included is fully client-only, meaning it works on almost any server with no setup required.

The goal of this pack is simple:
Better performance. Better visuals. Better utility. Vanilla gameplay.

### 🚀 Performance & Optimisation

This modpack includes a curated set of optimisation mods that significantly improve performance across the board:

Faster chunk loading & world generation

Higher and more stable FPS

Better memory usage and reduced stuttering

Smarter rendering and culling

Improved networking and packet handling

From rendering to redstone to chunk management, nearly every part of the game runs smoother and more efficiently.

### 🎨 Visual & Audio Enhancements

Enjoy a more immersive world without drifting away from the vanilla style:

Support for shaders (Iris included)

Optional high-quality shader presets bundled in

Better connected textures and smoother block models

Enhanced entity textures, models, and animations

Lightweight particle and environment improvements

More immersive footsteps and ambient sounds

Visual upgrades remain subtle and performance-friendly, with everything fully configurable.

### 🧰 Utility & Quality of Life

Useful, non-intrusive client features that enhance everyday play:

Improved menus, settings, and configuration tools

On-screen information such as tooltips, food values, and block details

Better inventory controls and sorting options

Minimaps and world maps that stay faithful to vanilla

Server-friendly UI additions like chat improvements, ping displays, and safety features

Each utility mod is carefully chosen to enhance comfort without giving unfair advantages or changing mechanics.

### 🛠 Building, Mapping & Creation Tools

Perfect for builders, technical players, and creative-minded users:

Ghost structure previews for planning builds

Cleaner block outlines and easier placement

Optional building automation helpers

Faster math, measuring, and in-game planning tools

These enhance creativity while keeping gameplay unchanged.

### 🎮 Stability & Compatibility

Behind the scenes, the pack includes libraries and engine improvements that:

Reduce crashes

Improve compatibility

Keep configs organized

Boost mod loading performance

Everything is tuned to work together cleanly, with no unnecessary clutter.

### 🌐 Why Use This Modpack?

✔ 100% client-side — works on almost any server

✔ Large FPS boost and smoother gameplay

✔ Enhanced visuals without losing the vanilla feel

✔ Useful utilities that don’t break or change gameplay

✔ Perfect for survival, SMPs, building, and casual play

✔ Fully configurable and lightweight


Whether you're exploring, building huge projects, or grinding SMP sessions, this pack gives you a fast, beautiful, and modern Minecraft experience while staying true to vanilla.
